chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1431 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 09.11.2016. Mr. Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for respondents No.5&6. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Rasool Bux of P.S Khipro. = Learned Counsel for respondent No.5 & 6 states that the said respondents have not extended any threats to the petitioner and secondly he is even ready to pay the entire sale consideration to the petitioner in respect of the sale of land. However, petitioner’s Counsel is busy before the learned D.B of this Court as reported by Mr. Muhammad Ayoub Leghari, Advocate. On the other hand, the learned A.A.G has filed his parawise comments, in which it has been confirmed that no criminal case has been registered against either of the parties-petitioner and private respondents. He further stated that police officials have not caused any harassment to the petitioner, however, they are ready to give protection to the petitioner. It is a recent trend that constitutional jurisdiction of this Court is being abused and usually the petitions are though filed to seek protection of life and liberty but when the case proceeds it then comes to light that the background facts are not disclosed. Be that as it may, this petition after statement of respondents becomes devoid of any merit and is consequently dismissed. JUDGE Shahid
